supersession_reason: The preproduction V1 selected successful results while scoring. V2 freezes the complete result-directory set before reading any payload so later completions cannot enter the same snapshot.
frozen_test_contract: count only; zero labels, identifiers, sequences or parent identifiers emitted
same_seed_contract: Only identical seeds successful for both 8x6b and 9e6y contribute to either receptor median.
snapshot_selection_contract: Freeze result job-id set before any scoring pass; completions after that selection are excluded.
